_description: Ratchet — floor/max values enforced by check-ratchet.js in CI.

testCount.note: v7.4.5 Durchhalten floor — measured baseline 5668 on Windows (full test:ci, v7.4.5 codebase). Floor set 1 below measured value, matching the 1-test safety buffer convention from v7.4.2/v7.4.4. Increase reflects new test/modules/v745-fix.test.js (27 regression locks for #16–#30 fixes).

fitnessScore.note: Architectural fitness score from audit:fitness. The 3-point gap is the binary File-Size-Guard penalty (any warn → 7/10). v7.4.5 file-size status: PromptBuilderSections.js (769 LOC, deferred via O-12 — bundled with BeliefStore reorg in v7.6+), EpisodicMemory.js (758 LOC, deferred — no driving feature touch yet), GoalDriver.js (829 LOC, NEW — grew through v7.4.5 #16–#22 rate-limit/race/lock fixes), AgentLoop.js (813 LOC, NEW — grew through #22–#23 completeGoal wiring), GoalStack.js (769 LOC, NEW — grew through completeGoal addition). Splits in v7.4.3 (Container, IntentRouter, SelfModificationPipeline) brought files under threshold once, but pipeline-functionality work in v7.4.5 grew three new candidates over the line. Score binary so unchanged; honest tracking via O-8 in AUDIT-BACKLOG.

schemaMismatches.note: scan-schemas.js must report 0. Runtime event payloads must match declared schemas. v7.4.5 scanner: 273 source files scanned, 436 emit/fire calls, 434 checked (1 spread-skipped), 0 mismatches.

schemaMissing.note: audit-schemas.js missing check — catalog entries without schema registrations.

schemaOrphan.note: audit-schemas.js orphan check — schemas without catalog entries.

brokenLinks.note: Internal docs/ links must all resolve.
